changeSet.author: ADMIN
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_open_api (id, operation_id, tags, uri_pattern, summary, security, parameters, request_body, responses, description, version, created_at, updated_at) SELECT id, name, '["NHSV_ADMIN"]', uri_pattern, name, '[{"jwt": []}]', '[[{"in":"query","name":"otpKey","schema":{"type":"string"},"required":true,"description":"OTP Key"},{"in":"query","name":"otpValue","schema":{"type":"string"},"required":true,"description":"OTP Value"}]]', '{"otpKey":{"type":"string"},"expiredTime":{"type":"string"}}', '{"200":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"otpKey":{"type":"string"},"expiredTime":{"type":"string"}}}}},"description":"OK"},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"}}', 'Verify OTP for Copy Trading', '/api/v1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope WHERE name = 'COPY_TRADING_VERIFY_OTP';

INSERT IGNORE INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'COPY_TRADING_VERIFY_OTP' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'PUBLIC';

changeSet.author: ADMIN
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map WHERE scope_id = ( SELECT ts.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts WHERE ts.name = 'COPY_TRADING_VERIFY_OTP' ) AND scope_group_id = ( SELECT tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE tsg.scope_group_name = 'PUBLIC' );

changeSet.author: ADMIN
changeSet.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'COPY_TRADING_VERIFY_OTP' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API';
